podNote: No RunPod pod was used. The only artifact is ssil-winset-compounding.mock-report.json with mode=mock — a synthetic dry-run, not a live GPU multi-generation run.
model: sophia-code-rlvr-gen{1..5} (mock adapter ids; no real weights, no inference executed)

headline.note: These curve values are HARD-CODED MOCK numbers, not measured passAt1. solverChecked=false on every generation -> no verifier ever ran. The per-gen heldoutDeltaWithCI fields (e.g. gen1 delta=0.4, ci [0.3942,0.4058]) are fabricated tight CIs that are physically impossible at the reported n=3.

perGenerationPassAt1Curve.note: passAt1 NOT measured. These are meanAfter mock values; gen-by-gen they are identical between gated and negative-control runs, differing only in the GATE VERDICT applied to gen5 (contaminated).

evalStats.reason: No per-item base-vs-adapter rows exist in the artifact (summary-only mock). bootstrap_ci_paired / verdict_or_underpowered cannot be applied to real data.

poweringOfReportedN.interpretation: Even taken at face value, n=3 per generation has an MDE of ~1.14 accuracy points (>1.0) — it cannot resolve ANY real effect. verdict_or_underpowered returns 'underpowered' for every generation (e.g. gen1 d=0.4 n=3 -> underpowered; gen3 d=0.12 n=3 -> underpowered). The mock CIs in the JSON are not derivable from n=3.

harnessCheck.rewardSpreadPositive: N/A — solverChecked=false; no generation group, no verifier reward computed
harnessCheck.verdict: NOT a real positive. mode=mock, solverChecked=false across all 5 generations. The compounding curve and CI separation are synthetic. Same evidential class as a NO-GO: there is no live, verifier-gated capability signal here. Treat exactly like a math/step NO-GO — record and move on.

poweredVerdict: underpowered/no-evidence — mock curve, no per-item data, per-gen n=3 MDE ~1.14 >> any delta; no live GPU run.
ci95: N/A (no per-item rows; reported per-gen CIs are fabricated mock values, not bootstrap-derived)
registeredResultNote: Mock/dry-run only; nothing to register. The artifact's own liveClaimStatus declares: 'Open — mock/dry-run compounding only; the live GPU multi-generation run is not yet gated.'
boundary: Bounded compounding within the verifier's reach; plateaus at the task/verifier ceiling. NOT open-ended RSI. canClaimAGI=false.
liveClaimStatus: Open — mock/dry-run compounding only; the live GPU multi-generation run is not yet gated. canClaimAGI stays false until a real --mode live run clears the SSIL gate on every generation.

structuralInvariantsExercised.note: These confirm the GATE LOGIC / scaffold behaves correctly on synthetic inputs. They are software-correctness invariants, NOT capability evidence.
